records.verbatim_request: Build and maintain the most complete, current, structured XRP tracking system possible for XRP's trajectory from current price levels to all milestone prices, including the extreme tail scenario of $10,000.
records.normalized_requirement: Maintain an additions-only, full-refresh XRP trajectory system covering all milestone bands and the $10,000 tail scenario without silently discarding prior logic.
records.notes: Bounded first tranche; not a full historical denominator.

records.verbatim_response: Keep two types of numbers in the snapshots: Unconditional probability and Scenario-consistency score.
records.normalized_requirement: Never combine unconditional probability, scenario-consistency score and trigger-activation score; show each separately.
records.rollback_ref: Restore prior record while preserving conflict history
records.notes: Corrects the historical ambiguity where a scenario score near 94% was presented like a real-world probability.

records.verbatim_request: No, you used to show much higher close to 94% probability of a $10,000 at one stage, do you remember?
records.normalized_requirement: Preserve the historic near-94% figure as lineage, but classify it as a scenario/trigger-alignment metric unless primary evidence proves it was an unconditional probability.
records.rollback_ref: Do not delete; change classification only with stronger evidence
records.notes: Historical value retained rather than erased.

records.normalized_requirement: Maintain milestone records for $3, $5, $10, $20, $50, $100, $150, $500, $1,000 and $10,000 with probability, scenario score, timing, triggers, missing conditions, upside and downside.

records.verbatim_response: Ripple/XRPL success does not automatically equal XRP token demand.
records.normalized_requirement: For every adoption claim, map the capital-flow pathway and distinguish Ripple equity, software, RLUSD, private-ledger and XRPL activity from direct XRP holding or transaction demand.
records.rollback_ref: Restore prior classification with discrepancy entry

records.verbatim_request: Update / deep scan XRP tracking system
records.normalized_requirement: UPDATE and DEEP SCAN must refresh the full visible-scope system, add newly found evidence, recalculate milestones and triggers, update discrepancies and preserve prior versions.
records.notes: Does not claim hidden continuous background execution.

records.verbatim_request: Always separate network or software adoption from direct XRP/HBAR token demand.
records.normalized_requirement: Apply the direct-demand and capital-flow truth gate to both XRP/Ripple and HBAR/Hedera analysis.
records.rollback_ref: Revert requirement version while retaining lineage

records.verbatim_request: Preserve repository independence: jarvis-build for governance, hub for runtime, videotranscribe for media evidence.
records.normalized_requirement: Keep governance, runtime and media-evidence repositories independently deployable and integrate them through versioned contracts and evidence references.
records.test_or_waiver: Repository contract CI passed; live canary pending
records.notes: Repository implementation is proven; runtime integration is not.

gaps.description: The complete historical XRP probability, table and trigger lineage has not yet been reconstructed from every accessible chat/export segment.
gaps.next_action: Process remaining dated XRP table, probability, trigger, discrepancy and assistant-response segments into atomic records.

gaps.description: HBAR/Hedera historical records are underrepresented in this first tranche.
gaps.next_action: Extract HBAR/Hedera requests, forecasts, catalysts, direct-demand claims and comparison history from accessible source packs.

gaps.description: Undervalued crypto, stock and ETF candidate/ranking history is not yet populated.
gaps.next_action: Inventory and process the undervalued-asset source denominator, including rejected and superseded candidates.

gaps.description: Schema validation and deterministic coverage checks are not yet wired into CI for the populated matrix.
gaps.next_action: Add JSON Schema validation, stable-ID uniqueness and denominator arithmetic checks to repository CI.

gaps.description: Live VTI-Hub-Jarvis runtime, migrations, protected secrets, authorised canary, purge and rollback remain unverified.
gaps.next_action: Prepare staging deployment and approval ticket; do not claim production readiness until end-to-end evidence exists.
